description: Build and deploy one web app to Vercel with Stripe subscriptions
tagline: AI-powered cold emails that actually get replies
problem: Writing personalized cold emails takes 15-30 min per email. Existing tools (Instantly $30+, Lemlist $39+) are too expensive for individuals and small teams.
target: Freelancers, solo sales reps, recruiters, startup founders who need affordable cold email generation
monetization: Freemium: Free (5 emails/month) + Pro $9.99/month (unlimited, all templates, tone adjustment, A/B variants)

userStories.title: Trend research + app name selection
acceptanceCriteria: prd.json exists with app_name, slug, tagline, problem, target, monetization
At least 5 trends evaluated, top 1 selected
userStories.notes: Selected ColdCraft - AI Cold Email Generator. 5 trends evaluated: AI Meeting Notes, Subscription Tracker, Content Repurposing, AI Cold Email, AI Landing Page Analyzer.

userStories.title: Next.js project initialization
acceptanceCriteria: Next.js 15 project created with TypeScript + Tailwind + App Router
userStories.notes: Next.js 15 + TypeScript + Tailwind + App Router + stripe + @stripe/stripe-js installed. Build passing.

userStories.title: Feature implementation with Stripe Checkout
acceptanceCriteria: Landing page (/) with hero + features + CTA
Pricing page (/pricing) with Stripe Checkout via Server Action
Webhook handler at /api/webhook (returns 503 if STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET not set)
No alert(), href='#', 'coming soon', console.log, TODO, lorem ipsum
userStories.notes: All pages: / (landing), /pricing, /generate, /success, /api/checkout, /api/webhook. Build passing. No forbidden patterns.

userStories.title: Quality check + E2E test
acceptanceCriteria: SEO: metadata in layout.tsx, robots.txt, sitemap.ts exist
Playwright E2E test passes (landing + pricing visible)
userStories.notes: Build PASS, Lint PASS, SEO (metadata+robots.txt+sitemap.ts), 7/7 Playwright E2E tests PASS

userStories.title: Vercel deploy
acceptanceCriteria: Deployed to Vercel with vercel deploy --prod
Slack notified with Webhook registration request
Vercel URL recorded in prd.json and progress.txt
userStories.notes: Deployed: https://20260302-150000-app.vercel.app. Env vars set. Slack webhook request sent.

userStories.title: Final report + AGENTS.md + X post
acceptanceCriteria: All US passes: true in prd.json
userStories.notes: All 7 US complete. AGENTS.md created. X post published.
